name: food-lifestyle
description: Food and lifestyle brand — warm, appetizing, rustic charm, Bon Appetit style
style: warm food photography, rustic surfaces, natural ingredients, Bon Appetit editorial style
typography: warm serif headlines, clean sans-serif for recipes and body text
lighting: warm natural window light from left, golden hour tones, soft directional shadows
visual_motifs: natural surface textures (wood grain, linen, marble) as backgrounds
do_list: Use overhead or 45-degree angles for food
prompt_suffix: Warm food photography aesthetic with natural window light, rustic surfaces, appetizing and authentic mood. Bon Appetit editorial style.
